raw_consumer_statement:
Using a Citibank credit card, I booked accommodation through the XXXX website, on which " XXXX XXXX  '', a XXXX company, advertises its properties. 

The booking conditions indicate that I had until XXXX XX/XX/year> to cancel, albeit with a 40 % penalty. 

I cancelled using the XXXX platform on XXXX XXXX and messaged the property owner several times, never getting a response. 

Around the end of XXXX, I initiated a chargeback for 60 % of the total cost ( {$640.00} out of the total of {$1000.00} ). 

On XX/XX/XXXX, Citi advised me that they had found in favor of the merchant, without asking me for any evidence or other information concerning the dispute. 

The same day, I both emailed Citi and sent them a letter by mail appealing the finding and providing documentary evidence of the timeline and conditions of booking. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, Citi messaged me again indicating that they " no longer have any available means to assist you in this matter since the timeframe in which to resolve a dispute has passed '', which is simply outrageous given that I responded to each of their messages on the same day they were sent. 

Please let me know if you require any additional information or evidence.
